patch.value: pm-search-advanced: register a built-in SearchProvider exemplar (search capability)

pm-search-advanced is the natural owner of registerSearchProvider but only uses commands+schema; the search capability has zero first-party exemplar for authors building custom embeddings/vector stores.
Manifest gains search capability; activate() registers an Ollama/local SearchProvider (and optionally a vector-store adapter); assertion-helper test; SDK.md search-provider example references it.

pm-search-advanced is the natural owner of registerSearchProvider but only uses commands+schema; the search capability has zero first-party exemplar for authors building custom embeddings/vector stores.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Unblocked + ready: pm-kfd8 (closed this PR) shipped assertRegisteredSearchProvider in src/sdk/testing.ts (matches on definition.name over registrations.search_providers). When this item teaches pm-search-advanced to api.registerSearchProvider(...), its package spec should assert via assertRegisteredSearchProvider for a non-synthetic first-party exemplar. Finding: pm-search-advanced currently only registers commands+flags, not a SearchProvider — this item is the real search-capability exemplar.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Plan: add a first-party SearchProvider exemplar to pm-search-advanced via api.registerSearchProvider in activate(). Provider name 'search-advanced-local' with a deterministic, dependency-free local lexical query(context) that scores context.documents by token overlap (title weight 3, tags 2, description 1) and returns SearchProviderHit[] sorted by score — invoked by core search when settings.search.provider='search-advanced-local'. Keep it INLINE in index.ts/index.js (consistent with the package's inline commands; index.* is not coverage-gated, so no 100% burden) + add 'search' capability to manifest.json + in-module manifest const + index.js mirror. Test (new spec): set PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT=cwd, import the REAL index.js, activate via the real loader, assertRegisteredSearchProvider({provider:'search-advanced-local'}), and invoke the registered query over sample docs to verify scoring (non-synthetic first-party exemplar). SDK.md Search Provider section will reference the exemplar + note authors can swap query for an Ollama embed/embedBatch-backed implementation. requires dist built (eager runtime), consistent with existing search-advanced-runtime.spec.ts.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implemented + verified. pm-search-advanced now registers a first-party SearchProvider exemplar via api.registerSearchProvider(searchAdvancedLocalProvider()). Provider 'search-advanced-local': deterministic dependency-free local lexical ranker (title weight 3, tags 2, description 1) returning sorted SearchProviderHit[]. Added inline to index.ts + index.js mirror; 'search' capability added to manifest.json + in-module manifest const + index.js. Exposed exports SEARCH_ADVANCED_LOCAL_PROVIDER + searchAdvancedLocalProvider. NEW test tests/unit/search-advanced-provider.spec.ts: sets PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT=cwd, imports the REAL index.js, activates via the real loader, assertRegisteredSearchProvider({provider:'search-advanced-local'}), and invokes the registered query over sample docs (pm-1 score 5 title+tags, pm-2 score 1 description, empty-query => []). SDK.md Search Provider section references the exemplar + the embed/embedBatch path for Ollama-style providers. Confirmed core search.ts:1349 dispatches the registered provider.query when settings.search.provider matches. Manual temp-dir e2e: `pm config set search.provider search-advanced-local` + `pm search calendar --json` returned the calendar-tagged item with matched_fields=['tags'] (provider engaged), no errors; package doctor ok, health ok. runtime.ts unchanged.

patch.value: Shipped: pm-search-advanced registers a first-party SearchProvider exemplar 'search-advanced-local' (deterministic dependency-free local lexical ranker) via api.registerSearchProvider. 'search' capability added across manifest.json + in-module const + index.js. Merged test in search-advanced-runtime.spec.ts (120-file cap respected) asserts via assertRegisteredSearchProvider against the real package activate and verifies ranking. SDK.md Search Provider section references the exemplar + the embed/embedBatch path for Ollama-style providers. Core search dispatches the provider when settings.search.provider matches (verified e2e).
